---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest an idea for Birthday Video AI
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: dragongCode
---

## Feature Summary

A one-line summary of the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem / Motivation

Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.
_Example: I'm always frustrated when [...]_

## Proposed Solution

A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Use Cases

Who would benefit from this feature, and how?

- [ ] Birthday celebrants (end users creating videos)
- [ ] Event planners / hosts creating invitations
- [ ] Pro / Enterprise users
- [ ] Internal team / dev workflow
- [ ] Other: _______

## Mockups / References

If applicable, add screenshots, screen recordings, or links to inspiration.

## Priority

- [ ] Must-have for next release
- [ ] Should-have (next quarter)
- [ ] Nice-to-have (backlog)

## Additional Context

Anything else we should know — related issues, prior art, technical constraints, etc.
